title: Raw Diamond Emerald
body:
This Mod adds a new mechanism to obtain Diamond and Emerald in minecraft. Usually in mining session, you will find diamonds. 

![Diamond From Stone Cutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e0fb348206e5a54a7827b258fd3266c9d38b08d.png)

When you mine from now, it drops as raw diamond item which can be stone cutted using stone cutter (can't be furnaced) to get Diamonds. The similar will be applicable for Emerald.

![Emerald From Stone Cutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe02680db65c035a9339fa891f9f06570b68371a.png)


Also This mod has added Diamond and Emerald Nuggets for No reason. Check out that too.
![Diamond Nuggets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f9fa10f31de26ee1e7e3fd1b0f94520ec837e1.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d26a5dd163c1f66e45819ab11216ad3dd00cb3.png)
